prompt: Ultra-realistic portrait of a man seated inside a gigantic transparent brain made of glass and chrome wires. The brain rests on the floor like a sculpture while glowing thoughts and tiny floating notes orbit inside. He wears modern streetwear: washed denim, fitted beige hoodie, white sneakers. The studio environment is minimal warm beige with dramatic empty space. Typography: “TOO LOUD” handwritten repeatedly around the background. Huge chaotic scribbled text: “THOUGHTS”. Smaller clean font below: “CAN’T TURN IT OFF”. Soft cinematic lighting reflecting through the transparent brain, high-fashion editorial look, surreal modern concept art, ultra detailed skin texture.
